creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
net/linphone rejects on recent CURRENT (FreeBSD 14.0-CURRENT #66 main-n256879-b77a5e5f5835: Thu Jul 21 22:14:09 CEST 2022 amd64). The problem also occurs on boxes running 13-STABLE:

[...]
===>   linphone-4.4.8,1 depends on shared library: libQt5Widgets.so - found (/usr/local/lib/qt5/libQt5Widgets.so)
===>  Configuring for linphone-4.4.8,1
===>  Performing out-of-source build
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/net/linphone/work/.build
